.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions to ensure compatibility with modern runners and security standards.
Update GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions to ensure compatibility with modern runners and security standards.
Update GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions to ensure compatibility with modern runners and security standards.
Update GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions to ensure compatibility with modern runners and security standards.
Update GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions to ensure compatibility with modern runners and security standards.
Update the Keycloak version matrix to test against recent versions (18.0.2 to 24.0.5) instead of legacy versions (8.0.1, 9.0.0).
Add conditional logic to apply Maven compatibility profiles for older Keycloak versions that require different dependencies (e.g., javax vs jakarta).
Refactor the Maven build command to use the wrapper script and include dynamic compatibility profiles and coverage flags.
Add Docker build and push steps to the CI workflow to automate container image creation and publishing to Docker Hub and Quay.io.
.github/workflows/ci.yaml.after:
- name: Build and push
  uses: docker/build-push-action@v5.3.0

.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Add a new job to lint YAML files and Helm charts to ensure configuration quality.
Add a new job to create GitHub releases with artifacts when a version tag is pushed.
Update the branch trigger from 'develop' to 'main' to align with standard Git flow conventions.
Add permissions declaration for the workflow to explicitly grant write access to contents for release creation.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Refactor Dockerfile to use a multi-stage build for smaller image size and better security.
Update the entrypoint to execute the Java application directly instead of starting a bash shell.
Add non-root user execution for improved container security.
Integrate Maven build steps into the Dockerfile to build the application inside the container.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY .mvn .mvn
COPY mvnw .
COPY pom.xml .
RUN ./mvnw ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} -q dependency:go-offline
COPY src src
RUN ./mvnw ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} clean package ...

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Keycloak version argument to match the new project dependencies.

LICENSE.txt.general_idea: Replace the placeholder copyright notice with the actual copyright holder and year.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update Keycloak service to use the modern Quarkus-based image and configuration format.
docker-compose.yml.before:
image: jboss/keycloak:9.0.0
    environment:
      KEYCLOAK_PASSWORD: admin123
      KEYCLOAK_USER: admin
    command:
    - "-b"
    - "0.0.0.0"
    - "--debug"
docker-compose.yml.after:
image: quay.io/keycloak/keycloak:${KEYCLOAK_VERSION}
    environment:
      KEYCLOAK_ADMIN: admin
      KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD: admin123
      KEYCLOAK_LOGLEVEL: INFO
      ROOT_LOGLEVEL: INFO
    command:
      - start-dev
      - --features admin-fine-grained-authz

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add a legacy Keycloak service for backward compatibility testing.
docker-compose.yml.after:
keycloak-legacy:
    image: quay.io/keycloak/keycloak:${KEYCLOAK_VERSION}-legacy
    environment:
      KEYCLOAK_PASSWORD: admin123
      KEYCLOAK_USER: admin
      KEYCLOAK_LOGLEVEL: INFO
      ROOT_LOGLEVEL: INFO
    volumes:
      - ./providers/:/opt/jboss/keycloak/providers/
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
      - "8787:8787"
    command:
      - "-c"
      - "standalone.xml"
      - "-Dkeycloak.profile.feature.admin_fine_grained_authz=enabled"

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add an OpenLDAP service for integration testing.
docker-compose.yml.after:
openldap:
    image: osixia/openldap:1.5.0
    command:
      - --loglevel
      - info
    environment:
      DISABLE_CHOWN: "true"
      LDAP_LOG_LEVEL: "256"
      LDAP_DOMAIN: "example.org"
      LDAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD: "admin123"
      LDAP_READONLY_USER: "false"
      LDAP_TLS: "false"
      LDAP_RFC2307BIS_SCHEMA: "false"
      LDAP_SEED_INTERNAL_LDIF_PATH: /resources/
    ports:
      - "8389:389"
    volumes:
      - ./src/test/resources/embedded-ldap.ldif:/resources/embedded-ldap.ldif

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update the keycloak-config-cli service to use the new image name and configuration properties.
docker-compose.yml.before:
post_process:
    build: .
    image: adorsys.de/keycloak-config-cli:latest
    depends_on:
    - keycloak
    links:
    - keycloak
    volumes:
    - ./example-config:/tmp/keycloak-config-cli/configs
    environment:
    - KEYCLOAK_URL=http://keycloak:8080
    - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN=admin
    - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin123
    - WAIT_TIME_IN_SECONDS=120
    - SPRING_PROFILES_INCLUDE=debug
    - IMPORT_FORCE=false
    command: config-cli
docker-compose.yml.after:
keycloak-config-cli:
    build: .
    image: adorsys/keycloak-config-cli:latest
    depends_on:
      - keycloak
    volumes:
      - ./contrib/example-config:/config
    environment:
      - keycloak.url=http://keycloak:8080
      - keycloak.user=admin
      - keycloak.password=admin123
      - keycloak.availability-check.enabled=true
      - spring.profiles.active=dev
      - import.cache.enabled=false
